title: La fuggitiva
writer: Milli Dandolo, Piero Ballerini, Salvatore Gotta
actors: Jole Voleri, Anna Magnani, Clelia Matania
plot: In the absence of the biological mother, too busy pursuing her theatrical career, we see the glorification of the maternal surrogate, a woman who is a paragon of sacrifice and self-abnegation. La Fuggitiva is also a film in which ...
